word: H4010 - מַבְלִיגִית - mablîygîyth - mab-leeg-eeth' - Comfort self

sections.paragraph:
Original: מבליגית

Transliteration: mablı̂ygı̂yth

Phonetic: mab-leeg-eeth'

BDB Definition:

  1. smiling, cheerfulness, source of cheerfulness or brightening

Origin: from H1082

TWOT entry: 245a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
